Article.ArticleTitle: Hydrogenated Cs₂AgBiBr₆ double perovskites: a sustainable lead-free route toward high-efficiency solar cells.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
